---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for KindleLaunch
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A brief, one-sentence description of the requested feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change in detail. Include examples of the API, CLI, or UI
if applicable.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you prefer this one?

## Risks and dependencies

- Security implications:
- Contract / upgrade implications:
- Dependencies on other issues or PRs:

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, diagrams, or references.
